name: ultra-memory
description: Project-agnostic agent-memory engine + read-only knowledge MCP for Claude Code. SQLite-canonical volatile memory with a single audited write gateway, OAuth-only LLM chokepoint, session checkpoint/rehydration hooks, and a type-scoped knowledge_query MCP tool. Code-only and content-free — your data/config stay private in the consumer project.

data_db_path.title: Canonical memory.db path
data_db_path.description: Optional override. Leave empty to auto-derive the fixed global ~/.ultra-memory/memory.db (the single store shared by every project). Set an absolute path only to override that fixed location.

caller_class.title: Knowledge-MCP caller class
caller_class.description: Privilege class for knowledge-MCP recall. Fail-closed: 'subagent' => project/reference facts only. Set 'orchestrator' only on a trusted top-level instance.

rehydrate_budget.title: Rehydration gist budget (chars)
rehydrate_budget.description: Character budget for the SessionStart rehydration gist.

oauth_token.title: Claude OAuth token (optional)
oauth_token.description: OAuth token, NEVER an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Only needed if a consumer runs LLM maintenance; the memory maintenance slice (prune+export) does not use it.

session_ingest_enable.title: Session capture (self-learning input)
session_ingest_enable.description: On by default. Mines each finished session into durable memory on YOUR Claude login (no API key). Set to 'off' to disable. Reads your local session transcript only.

attribution_enable.title: Outcome attribution
attribution_enable.description: On by default. Credits which recalled facts helped. 'off' to disable.

aggressive_enable.title: Self-correction (rewrite/revert/quarantine)
aggressive_enable.description: On by default, behind the safety wall; acts only where a git checkpoint exists, else self-skips. 'off' to disable.

synthesize_enable.title: Skill synthesis
synthesize_enable.description: On by default, behind the safety wall + eval-gate; acts only where a git checkpoint exists. 'off' to disable.

graduate_enable.title: Atomic graduation (auto-capture lessons as wiki pages)
graduate_enable.description: On by default, behind the Signal dedup-gate + a self-recall eval-gate (quarantine-not-delete). Auto-captures durable gotchas/lessons as findable wiki pages on YOUR Claude login (no API key). Set to 'off' to disable.
